name: sudo39
description: Guarded privilege-elevation MCP server for AI agents. Run commands via sudo, pkexec, macOS admin prompt, or Windows UAC, gated by an allowlist policy.

binaryPath.description: Path to the sudo39 binary. Defaults to 'sudo39' (must be in PATH).

allowedPrograms.description: Comma-separated list of allowed programs (sets SUDO39_ALLOWED_PROGRAMS).

allowUnsafe.description: Allow any program without allowlist check (sets SUDO39_ALLOW_UNSAFE=1).

timeoutSecs.description: Per-execution timeout in seconds (sets SUDO39_TIMEOUT_SECS). Default: 30.

askpassPath.description: Path to askpass helper for sudo -A (sets SUDO39_ASKPASS).

binaryPath.label: Binary path
binaryPath.help: Absolute path to the sudo39 binary, or leave empty to use PATH

allowedPrograms.label: Allowed programs
allowedPrograms.help: Comma-separated list of programs the agent is allowed to elevate

allowUnsafe.label: Allow unsafe (any program)
allowUnsafe.help: Skip the allowlist - permits any program. Use with caution.

timeoutSecs.label: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSecs.help: Maximum seconds a command may run before being killed

askpassPath.label: Askpass helper
askpassPath.help: Path to an askpass program for non-interactive sudo
